zh.Northumberland, Virginia, British Coloni: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾圖波藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Harding II於1714年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德時，他的父親Henry Harding40歲，母親Anne11711歲。他於1736年之前與Wilmouth George在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1779年11月25日之前在美國維吉尼亞州申南多阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Harding II于1714年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德时，他的父亲Henry Harding40岁，母亲Anne11711岁。他于1736年之前与Wilmouth George在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1779年11月25日之前在美国弗吉尼亚州申南多阿。

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
"Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Harding II was born in 1714, in Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Henry Harding, was 40 and his mother, Anne, was 11711. He married Wilmouth George before 1736, in Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 25 November 1779, in Shenandoah, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Harding II est né en 1714, à Stafford, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Harding, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Anne, avait 11711 ans. Il a épousé Wilmouth George avant 1736, à Stafford, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 25 novembre 1779, à Shenandoah, Virginie, États-Unis.

Er hat vor 1736 in Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America Wilmouth George geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 25. November 1779 in Shenandoah, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

Lui sposato Wilmouth George prima del 1736, nel Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Henry Harding IIが1714年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スタフォードで生まれた時，父Henry Hardingは40歳，母Anneは11711歳であった。1736年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スタフォードでWilmouth Georgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1779年11月25日以前にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州シェナンドアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Harding II(이)가 1714년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Harding(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne(은)는 11711세였다. 그는 1736년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 스태퍼드에서 Wilmouth George(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1779년 11월 25일 이전 미국 버지니아 주 셰난도에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Harding II nasceu em 1714, em Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Harding, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Anne, tinha 11711 anos. Ele casou-se com Wilmouth George antes 1736, em Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 25 de novembro de 1779, em Shenandoah, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Overwharton Parish, Stafford, Virginia,: овируартон пэриш, стаффорд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Harding II родился в 1714 г. в местности стаффорд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Henry Harding было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne, 11711. Он женился на женщине по имени Wilmouth George перед 1736 г. в местности стаффорд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 25 ноябрь 1779 г. в местности шенандоах, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.
